_source: Real Anthropic Messages response captured from a local Claude Code session transcript.
_redaction: The usage object is VERBATIM from the real API response. Prompt/response `content` was dropped entirely and the message id replaced with a placeholder — the tracker never stores raw text. No token count was altered.
_proves: input_tokens (2) < cache_read_input_tokens (18023): cache_read cannot be contained inside input_tokens, so Anthropic cache buckets are SEPARATE additive inputs (INV-4 total_contributing), not subtotal_of input. Anthropic reports no total_tokens, so provider_total_tokens is None and reconciliation is by bucket semantics, not a total.
